Looking at the assembly, I can see a checkerboard pattern computation at 0x401ca0-0x401ccc:
- Convert floats to doubles
- Add them
- Convert to integer
- Test bit 0 (checkerboard pattern)
- If odd, use one color (0x480014 = 0.9)
- If even, use another color (0x480018 = 0.4)
Then multiply by some factor.
